ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic data entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the economic data */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state or territory */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the state based on economic performance */,
  "income_2014" REAL /* Income level for the year 2014 */,
  "income_2015" REAL /* Income level for the year 2015 */,
  "income_2016" REAL /* Income level for the year 2016 */,
  "income_2017" REAL /* Income level for the year 2017 */,
  "income_2018" REAL /* Income level for the year 2018 */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) for the state in that year */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate for the state in that year */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the state in that year */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state in that year */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate for the state in that year */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate for the state in that year */,
  "median_household_income" REAL /* Median household income for the state in that year */,
  "industrial_growth" REAL /* Industrial growth rate for the state in that year */,
  "service_sector_growth" REAL /* Service sector growth rate for the state in that year */,
  "agricultural_growth" REAL /* Agricultural growth rate for the state in that year */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the economic data */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_rank FOREIGN KEY ("rank") REFERENCES ranks ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state or territory */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the United States where the state is located */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the state was founded */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the state */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the state */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the current governor */,
  "state_website" TEXT /* URL of the state's official website */,
  "state_flag" TEXT /* URL or path to the state's flag image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the economic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank entry */,
  "rank_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rank */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ranking criteria */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Year for which the rank is valid */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., economist, data analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user in the system */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income trend entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state associated with the income trend */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year associated with the income trend */,
  "income" REAL /* Income level for the state in that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_trends_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_trends_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state associated with the metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., employment rate, GDP growth) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric for the state */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Year for which the metric is valid */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_metrics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_metrics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_population" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state associated with the population */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state in that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_population_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report generation */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the report */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_reports_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
